accepted_questions: What evidence is available for Acraea andromacha?

claims.statement: Acraea andromacha is an accepted species in the authoritative rebuilt ButterflyLens catalogue.
The submitted reference diagnostics report 20 selected valid decodes and zero human-verified media; release remains blocked by unfinished models and human review.

limitations: No GPT-5.6 or other model was invoked to generate or display this replay.
Accepted taxonomy and provisional references do not identify a photograph or establish an occurrence.
response.summary: This stored replay shows submitted evidence for Acraea andromacha; it does not identify a photo or release an occurrence.

facts.interpretation: The rebuilt ButterflyLens baseline is authoritative for this goal.
facts.name: authoritative_baseline

facts.interpretation: This evidence view does not itself verify a photo identity or occurrence.
facts.name: scientific_claim_allowed

limitations: English names remain sourced unreviewed assertions.
Reference counts are provisional workflow diagnostics, not verified identities or quality estimates.
YOLOE, BioCLIP, and human reference review are unfinished or absent.

accepted_questions: Can ALA and Flickr counts be compared yet?

claims.statement: The national ALA occurrence count is withheld by the submitted dataset-rights boundary.
No completed immutable national Flickr candidate count is present in the stored submitted evidence.
The count difference is unavailable; missing evidence is not a zero or evidence of biological absence.

limitations: No GPT-5.6 or other model was invoked to generate or display this replay.
The replay does not inspect the active Flickr fetch or any partial BioMiner output.
response.summary: The stored submitted evidence cannot yet support an ALA/Flickr count comparison.

facts.interpretation: ALA counts are withheld by the submitted dataset-rights boundary.
facts.name: ala_occurrence_count

facts.interpretation: No completed immutable Flickr candidate snapshot exists for the requested scope.
facts.name: flickr_candidate_count

facts.interpretation: A difference is not calculated unless both comparable counts are admitted.
facts.name: count_difference

facts.interpretation: The submitted evidence does not satisfy the same-scope two-source comparison gate.
facts.name: comparison_allowed

limitations: Unavailable is not zero and does not imply absence.
No active Flickr or BioMiner output was inspected.

query.interpretation: National scope has no subordinate scope ID.
query.name: scope_id

output.summary: ALA and Flickr cannot yet be compared from committed governed evidence for this scope.

accepted_questions: Which species should receive the next reference review?

claims.statement: The stored queue orders Hypochrysops sandrae, Lacturnea lacturnus, then Charaxes andrewsi for targeted reference-gap review.
All three have zero selected reference media and zero human-verified media in this stored trace.
This is targeted workflow order, not a ranking of rarity, presence, conservation importance, or dataset quality.

limitations: No GPT-5.6 or other model was invoked to generate or display this replay.
Reference-gap priorities are provisional diagnostics and cannot establish photo identity or occurrence.
response.summary: The stored deterministic reference-gap queue returns three species-level workflow priorities.
